channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ASALCBR] Anand Kumar Kedia Acquires 2.24% Stake in Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd
item.description:
Anand Kumar Kedia has acquired 4,50,000 shares carrying voting rights in Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd, increasing his total holding to 8.10%. This acquisition was made on March 16, 2026, and the total diluted share/voting capital of the company remains unchanged at 2,00,79,200 equity shares of face value of Rs. 10/- each.

  • Anand Kumar Kedia acquires 2.24% stake in Associated Alcohols & Breweries Ltd
  • Total shares held by Kedia after acquisition: 16,27,400
  • Shares acquired: 4,50,000
  • Total shares of the company: 2,00,79,200
  • Face value of shares: Rs. 10/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ASSOCIATED ALCOHOLS & BREWERIES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [MOBIKWIK] Mobikwik Appoints Anis Pathan as Chief Risk Officer and Senior Management Personnel
item.description:
One Mobikwik Systems Ltd. has announced the appointment of Mr. Anis Pathan as Chief Risk Officer and Senior Management Personnel. Mr. Pathan, a seasoned risk management professional with over 14 years of experience in banking, payments, microfinance, insurance, and financial services in India and the Middle East, has held leadership roles at Oman Arab Bank, Chaitanya India Fin Credit Pvt Ltd, and NSDL Payments Bank. He holds an MBA in Finance from Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies and a Bachelor of Engineering from Nagpur University. He is also professionally certified as FRM by Global Association of Risk Professionals, CISA by ISACA, and SCR (Sustainability and Climate Risk).

  • Mobikwik appoints Anis Pathan as Chief Risk Officer and Senior Management Personnel
  • Pathan brings over 14 years of experience in banking, payments, microfinance, insurance, and financial services
  • He has held leadership roles at Oman Arab Bank, Chaitanya India Fin Credit Pvt Ltd, and NSDL Payments Bank
  • Pathan holds an MBA in Finance from Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies and a Bachelor of Engineering from Nagpur University
  • He is professionally certified as FRM by Global Association of Risk Professionals, CISA by ISACA, and SCR (Sustainability and Climate Risk)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: One Mobikwik Systems Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PARKHOTELS] Promoter Karan Paul Acquires 0.02071% Stake in Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd
item.description:
Karan Paul, one of the promoters of Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd, has acquired 0.02071% stake in the company. The acquisition was made through on-market purchase on March 17, 2026 (18,070 shares) and March 18, 2026 (26,110 shares). The total equity share capital of the company is INR 21,33,74,246 divided into 21,33,74,246 fully paid-up equity shares of INR 1/- each. The consolidated shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group is now 68.16529% of the total share capital.

  • Karan Paul acquires 0.02071% stake in Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd
  • The acquisition was made through on-market purchase on March 17 and 18, 2026
  • The total equity share capital of the company is INR 21,33,74,246 divided into 21,33,74,246 fully paid-up equity shares of INR 1/- each
  • The consolidated shareholding of the Promoter and Promoter Group is now 68.16529% of the total share capital

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apeejay Surrendra Park Hotels Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [PATELENG] Patel Engineering Receives Award for Renuka Ji Dam Project Worth Rs. 910.08 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Patel Engineering Ltd. has received the Letter of Award (LoA) from Himachal Pradesh Power Corporation Limited (HPPCL) for the Renuka Ji Dam Project (Package-1), valued at Rs. 910.08 crores including GST. The project, located at Village Dadahu, Tehsil Renuka, District Sirmaur, Himachal Pradesh, is scheduled to be completed within a timeline of 30 months. Under this package, Patel Engineering will undertake the construction of three major diversion tunnels, each designed with a diameter of 9.5 meters and extending over lengths ranging from 1.3 to 1.6 kilometers. The works also encompass the creation of inlet and outlet structures for these tunnels, development of approximately 6 kilometers of approach and access roads, and installation of advanced hydro-mechanical systems to regulate water flow. Additionally, the project scope includes comprehensive instrumentation and monitoring systems to ensure long- term operational reliability and safety.

  • Patel Engineering received LOA from HPPCL for Renuka Ji Dam Project (Package-1) worth Rs. 910.08 crores.
  • The project involves construction of three major diversion tunnels, inlet and outlet structures, approach and access roads, and advanced hydro-mechanical systems.
  • The project is located at Village Dadahu, Tehsil Renuka, District Sirmaur, Himachal Pradesh and is scheduled for completion within 30 months.
  • Patel Engineering has a strong presence in hydropower, tunnelling and irrigation segments with a consistent track record in execution of projects.
  • The company has completed over 85 dams, 40 hydroelectric projects and more than 300 km of tunnelling for clients which are mostly central PSUs or state government organizations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PATEL ENGINEERING LTD.-$ | Category: New Launch

item.title: [MEHUL] Mehul Pravinchandra Joshi Acquires 2.29% Additional Stake in Mehul Colours Ltd
item.description:
Mehul Pravinchandra Joshi has acquired 2.29% additional shares in Mehul Colours Ltd, a company formerly known as Mehul Colours and Masterbatches Private Limited. The acquisition was made in concert with other persons acting in concert, namely Bhakti Mehul Joshi, Usha Pravinchandra Joshi, and the late Pravinchandra Girdharlal Joshi. The total holding of the acquirer along with PACs now stands at 71.53%. The acquisition was made through open market purchases, with the total transaction value being INR 10,54,90,400.00. The shares were purchased in multiple tranches, with the regulatory threshold being exceeded on 16th March, 2026.

  • Mehul Pravinchandra Joshi acquires 2.29% additional shares in Mehul Colours Ltd
  • Acquisition made in concert with other persons acting in concert
  • Total holding of the acquirer along with PACs now stands at 71.53%
  • Transaction value of INR 10,54,90,400.00
  • Shares purchased in multiple tranches with the regulatory threshold exceeded on 16th March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mehul Colours Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [REGAL] Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd Fixes Record Date for Right Issue of Equity Shares
item.description:
The Right Issue Committee of Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd has fixed Wednesday, March 25, 2026 as the Record Date for the purpose of ascertaining the shareholders who will be eligible to receive the Rights Entitlements under the Rights Issue of the company. This decision is in accordance with Regulation 42 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and Regulation 68 of the SEBI (Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2018. The information has been uploaded on the company's official website for record.

  • Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd has fixed the Record Date for the Right Issue of equity shares.
  • The Record Date is set as Wednesday, March 25, 2026.
  • The decision is in accordance with SEBI regulations 42 and 68.
  • The information has been uploaded on the company's official website.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [REGAL] Regal Entertainment Announces Rights Issue of Equity Shares worth Rs 817.18 Lakh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd has approved the issue of equity shares on a rights basis to the eligible shareholders. The Right Issue Committee has considered and approved the terms of the Rights Issue, which includes the issuance of 58,36,990 fully paid-up Equity Shares for an aggregate amount not exceeding Rs 817.18 lakh. The Rights Issue Price is X14/- per Equity Share, including a share premium of 4/- per Equity Share. The Record Date is set for 25th March, 2026 and the Rights Issue period is from 19th March to 20th April, 2026.

  • Regal Entertainment approves Rights Issue of equity shares worth Rs 817.18 lakh
  • 58,36,990 fully paid-up Equity Shares to be issued
  • Rights Issue Price set at X14/- per Equity Share with a share premium of 4/-
  • Record Date set for 25th March, 2026
  • Rights Issue period from 19th March to 20th April, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Regal Entertainment & Consultants Ltd | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [APCOTEXIND] Promoter Group of Apcotex Industries Acquires Shares Through Inter-Se Transfer
item.description:
Rita Ashok Parekh, a promoter group member of Apcotex Industries Ltd, has acquired 4,000 shares from other promoter group members, Mrs. Rita Ashok Parekh and Janaki Parekh. This acquisition took place under an inter-se transfer without any consideration. The total share capital of the company remains unchanged at Rs.10,36,89,920 (5,18,44,960 equity shares of Rs.2/- each) after the acquisition.

  • Rita Ashok Parekh, a promoter group member, acquired 4,000 shares from other promoter group members.
  • The acquisition took place under an inter-se transfer without any consideration.
  • The total share capital of the company remains unchanged after the acquisition.
  • Apcotex Industries Ltd is listed on BSE Limited and National Stock Exchange of India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APCOTEX INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [APCOTEXIND] Promoter Group of Apcotex Industries Ltd Acquires Shares Through Inter-Se Transfer
item.description:
Rita Ashok Parekh, a promoter group member of Apcotex Industries Ltd, has acquired 62,280 shares from other promoter group members under an inter-se transfer without any consideration. This acquisition increases the promoter group's holding to 0.61% from 0.49% in the company. The acquired shares were not encumbered and there were no warrants or convertible securities involved. The acquisition took place on March 18, 2026.

  • Rita Ashok Parekh, a promoter group member, acquired 62,280 shares from other promoter group members.
  • The acquisition increased the promoter group's holding to 0.61% from 0.49% in the company.
  • The shares were acquired without any consideration.
  • No encumbrances, warrants, or convertible securities were involved in the acquisition.
  • The acquisition took place on March 18, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: APCOTEX INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SATTRIX] Sattrix Information Security Ltd Granted Trading Approval for 45,48,379 Equity Shares at Premium of Rs. 337/- Each
item.description:
Sattrix Information Security Ltd has received trading approval from BSE Limited for 45,48,379 equity shares of Rs. 10/- each at an issue price of Rs. 347/- (Rupees Three hundred Forty-Seven Only) each. These shares have been allotted to promoters and non-promoters on a preferential basis pursuant to a Share Swap. The trading of these securities will commence from March 19, 2026.

  • Sattrix Information Security Ltd has been granted trading approval for 45,48,379 equity shares.
  • The shares have been allotted to promoters and non-promoters on a preferential basis pursuant to a Share Swap.
  • The shares are priced at Rs. 347/- (Rupees Three hundred Forty-Seven Only) each.
  • The trading of these securities will commence from March 19, 2026.
  • The approval has been granted by BSE Limited under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements), 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sattrix Information Security Ltd | Category: New Launch
